description: Answer ending in a dangling <citations> opener with no closing tag (weak models open the block and truncate). The citation parser's unterminated-block tolerance consumes from the opener to end-of-string, so the literal tag never reaches the user; the prose before it is delivered. With no chunks registered this turn, the [1] entry inside the block cannot resolve and is dropped (no citations). Pinned by the parser contract in src/machina/agent/citations.py (_UNTERMINATED_CITATIONS_RE).
user_messages: How often should the bearing be replaced?

turns.content:
Replace the bearing every 6 months and grease it quarterly [1].

<citations>
